title: Add 'Car Care Kit Box' Bundle Product to Products Page

requirements.text: Add a 'Car Care Kit Box' combo/bundle product entry to the products data in frontend/src/data/products.ts. The bundle includes DBS Car Shine Solution, Scratch Remover Pro, and Nano Gloss Polish. Set a discounted bundle price that is clearly lower than the sum of the three individual product prices. Include a short description that names all three included products and highlights the value/savings.

quotes: ADD ANOTHER COMBO PRODUTCS OPTION OF DBS , SCARTCH REMOVER AND ONE OTHER PRODUCT AS BUNDLE PRICING AT A DISCOUNTED RATE NAMED CARE CARE KIT BOX

acceptanceCriteria: A product named 'Car Care Kit Box' exists in the products data array
The bundle lists DBS Car Shine Solution, Scratch Remover Pro, and Nano Gloss Polish as included items
The bundle price is visibly discounted compared to buying the three products individually
A 'You Save' or original vs. discounted price indicator is shown on the card

requirements.text: Display the 'Car Care Kit Box' bundle on the Products page (frontend/src/pages/Products.tsx) using a visually distinct card or badge to indicate it is a combo/bundle deal. The card should list the three included products, show both the original combined price (struck through) and the discounted bundle price, and include a 'BUNDLE DEAL' or 'COMBO' badge. Use the existing ProductCard component or extend it to support a bundle variant. The card should appear at the top or end of the product grid in a highlighted/featured position.

quotes: IN PRODUCTS SECTION CAN YOU ALSO ADD ANOTHER COMBO PRODUTCS OPTION
BUNDLE PRICING AT A DISCOUNTED RATE NAMED CARE CARE KIT BOX

acceptanceCriteria: 'Car Care Kit Box' card is visible on the Products page
Card displays a 'BUNDLE DEAL' or 'COMBO' badge using the brand's yellow or blue accent
Card lists all three included product names
Original combined price is shown with a strikethrough and the discounted price is prominently displayed
Card has the same hover effects (scale/shadow) as other product cards
A yellow 'Shop Now' button is present on the bundle card

requirements.text: Generate a product bundle image for the 'Car Care Kit Box' showing three car care product bottles/containers grouped together as a kit set, styled consistently with the existing product images (clean white background, professional product photography style). Use filename car-care-kit-box.dim_600x600.png and reference it in the Car Care Kit Box product data and card.
acceptanceCriteria: Bundle product card displays the car-care-kit-box image
Image visually represents a grouped kit of car care products

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui
Bundle pricing must be a genuine discount — lower than the sum of individual product prices
Maintain existing product card layout and brand design system (blue #1A3C8F, yellow #F5C518)
nonGoals: Do not implement a shopping cart or checkout flow
Do not add backend persistence for product data
Do not change prices of the existing four individual products
Do not add more than one bundle/combo product

required: Three car care product bottles grouped together as a bundle kit on a clean white background, professional product photography style with soft shadows (car-care-kit-box.dim_600x600.png)
